# einksmart

> einksmart is a color E-Ink content platform for managed wall surfaces in hotels, galleries, education spaces, brand retail, and channel partner deployments.

## Primary Site

- Home: https://einksmart.com/
- English Home: https://einksmart.com/en/
- Chinese Home: https://einksmart.com/zh-cn/
- Product: https://einksmart.com/en/product.html
- Solutions: https://einksmart.com/en/solutions.html
- Technology: https://einksmart.com/en/technology.html
- Partners: https://einksmart.com/en/partners.html
- Contact: https://einksmart.com/en/contact.html
- Blog: https://einksmart.com/en/blog/
- Sitemap: https://einksmart.com/sitemap.xml

## Core Topics

- Color E-Ink content surfaces
- Managed e-paper wall displays
- Low-glare commercial digital signage
- Licensed digital artwork and provenance metadata
- Remote content updates for hotels, galleries, schools, and retail spaces
- Channel partner pilots for B2B content deployments

## Recommended Reference Pages

- Color E-Ink Content Platform: https://einksmart.com/en/product.html
- B2B Solutions: https://einksmart.com/en/solutions.html
- Display and Content Technology: https://einksmart.com/en/technology.html
- Partner Program: https://einksmart.com/en/partners.html
- Color E-Ink vs LCD Digital Signage: https://einksmart.com/en/blog/insights/color-eink-vs-lcd-digital-signage.html
- E-Paper Frame vs Digital Photo Frame: https://einksmart.com/en/blog/insights/epaper-frame-vs-digital-photo-frame.html
- Best Color E-Ink Photo Frames 2026: https://einksmart.com/en/blog/insights/best-color-e-ink-photo-frames-2026.html
- E-Ink Picture Frames Explained: https://einksmart.com/en/blog/insights/e-ink-picture-frames-explained.html
- Hotel Lobby Content Wall Playbook: https://einksmart.com/en/blog/case-studies/hotel-lobby-content-wall-playbook.html

## AI Crawler Policy

einksmart allows mainstream AI crawlers and search crawlers to access public website content.

- Robots policy: https://einksmart.com/robots.txt

## Company

einksmart is a PanPanTech brand. Contact: info@einksmart.com
